name: Badge
purpose: Compact status, category, or count label for tasks, sources, model runs, and market entities.

structures.name: Status Badge
structures.notes: Leading dot borrows tone color; surface uses a tinted color-mix of the same token.

structures.name: Category Tag
structures.notes: Soft rectangle for industry, sector, or dataset classification.

structures.name: Count Badge
structures.notes: Tabular numerals for counters such as unread or pending items.

interactionNotes: Badges are non-interactive by default; pair color tone with text so meaning is not color-only.
Use tinted surfaces via color-mix instead of fully saturated fills to keep the calm tone.
